judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue expansion and free cash flow, but currently operating at breakeven and trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 12.1%; next earnings date 2026-05-28.
positives: Revenue growth 26.7% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Free cash flow (TTM) $463.32M — positive cash generation.
Gross margin 71.7% — healthy margin on services.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $358.82.
Current ratio 4.65 and Quick ratio 4.31 indicate strong short-term liquidity.
negatives: Operating margin 0.0% and Profit margin -2.9% — company is not yet profitable on an operating basis.
Forward P/E 44.69x and Price/Sales 10.34x — valuation is high.
Return on equity -2.5% and Return on assets -2.4% — negative returns on capital.

news.paragraph: BMO Capital Markets reiterated a positive stance on MongoDB (MDB), citing its strong position in the database market and potential for sustained growth. This analyst commentary comes just ahead of the company's upcoming earnings report, suggesting continued confidence in its business model. Traders should monitor the market's reaction to the analyst's view and the upcoming earnings release for potential catalysts.

headlines.title: MongoDB (MDB) Remains Well-Positioned In The Database Market And Has Durable Growth Potential, Says BMO Capital

$MDB i love it! Thank god this is the dumbest market ever giving us amazing opportunities.
